name: earnscore-dashboard
description: Cloudflare Workers live dashboard for AiScore data sync

scripts.d1:verify: wrangler d1 execute earnscore-db --local --command="SELECT COUNT(*) AS v3_tables FROM sqlite_master WHERE type='table' AND name IN ('sports','match_state_history','odds_current','odds_history','match_detail_sections','match_detail_data','assets','asset_links','feed_sessions','feed_events','detail_jobs','asset_jobs','recovery_jobs','sync_outbox','migration_audit');"
